chunks.text: 1 ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI H.C.A. No.453 of 2023 Dr. Ghulam Hussain Jaffar Versus Dr. Nazeer Hussain Kalhoro and others DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE(S). Fresh Case 1. For orders on CMA No.5865/2023 (Urgent). 2. For orders on CMA No.5866/2023 (Condonation of Delay). 3. For orders on CMA No.5867/2023 (Exemption). 4. For hearing of main case. 5. For orders on CMA No.5868/2023 (Stay)..-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-. Dated 14.12.2023 Mr. Ali Asadullah Bullo, Advocate for the Appellant. Mr. Muhammad Ali Lakhani, Advocate for Respondent No.1 Mr. Malik Altaf Hussain, Advocate for Respondents No.17 & 18..-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-. 1) Urgency granted. 2-5) It is only an ad-interim order, which the appellant has impugned it in this High Court Appeal. We do not find any reason to interfere in the impugned ad- interim order at this stage, which was passed only yesterday. We, therefore, deem it appropriate, with the consent of Mr. Muhammad Ali Lakhani, learned counsel for Respondent No.1 and Mr. Altaf Hussain, learned counsel for Respondents No.17 and 18, who are in attendance in view of Notice under Order-XLII Rule-3 CPC, to direct the parties and their counsels that no delay be caused to the proceedings, at least the injunction application listed and fixed before the learned single Judge, which preferably be disposed off in three weeks’ time, soon after winter holidays. The instant High Court Appeal stands disposed of in the above terms along with listed applications. JUDGE JUDGE Ayaz Gul
